epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: DSM-5/ICD-11 criteria; requires specialist assessment and differentiation from psychosis and cultural presentations

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate due to limited specialized psychotherapy access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Diagnosis concentrated in tertiary psychiatry; somatic and cultural framing may complicate recognition
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Trauma-informed psychotherapy and management of comorbid PTSD/depression; crisis support when needed
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High stigma and limited availability of trauma-focused psychotherapy
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Expanding tele-mental health services may improve access to counseling and follow-up
